sections.paragraph:
Original: סלף

Transliteration: sâlaph

Phonetic: saw-laf'

BDB Definition:

  1. to twist, pervert, distort, overturn, ruin
    1. (Piel)
      1. to pervert (of bribery)
      2. to subvert, turn upside down, ruin

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1510

Part(s) of speech: Verb
